cms.task_text: Naprogramujte čtverec o straně 80 px, kde [hlp]každá strana má jinou barvu[/hlp] (červená, modrá, zelená, žlutá).
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_set_pen_color_fixed" x="50" y="50"><field name="COLOUR">#ff0000</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_set_pen_color_fixed"><field name="COLOUR">#0000ff</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_set_pen_color_fixed"><field name="COLOUR">#00aa00</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_set_pen_color_fixed"><field name="COLOUR">#ffaa00</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
